## Infographic: Parents and Grandparents backlog reduction

## Download the PDF Version
Parents and Grandparents backlog reduction ( PDF , 35.8 KB )

## Text version: Infographic - Reuniting More Families: Parents and Grandparents
The parents and grandparents backlog has been reduced by 84%.
- 2011 backlog: 167,000
- 2018 backlog: 25,800
